---
title: "Cleaning.document LearnR3"
author: "KSV"
format: html
---

## Prepare data

```{r setup}
#| include: false
```

###We're loading all preprocessed datasets
```{r}
hr_data <- read_all("HR.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()

temp_data <-read_all("TEMP.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()

eda_data <-read_all("EDA.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()

bvp_data <-read_all("BVP.csv.gz") |>
  get_participant_id() |>
  summarise_by_datetime()

```
